summary: Normative representation classes for controlled documents. Automated cleansing checks implement a subset; full standard requires HITL and Formatter governance.

classes.name: Numeric Quantity
classes.notes: Numerals for quantities; words must not replace numerals in operational steps.

classes.name: Inequality
classes.notes: Symbols < > ≤ ≥ must be accompanied by words.

classes.name: Range
classes.notes: Hyphenated numeric ranges prohibited; use words with numerals.

classes.name: Temperature
classes.notes: First use: words + symbol; then °C consistently.

classes.name: Time Duration
classes.notes: Do not abbreviate minutes, hours, days (min, hr, etc.).

classes.name: Tolerance / Approximation
classes.notes: Prefer explicit words; ± / approx. symbols risky alone.

classes.name: Diagrams / Images
classes.notes: Text explains action; not image-only instruction.

classes.name: Formatting Reliance
classes.notes: Bold/colour must not sole carrier of meaning.

classes.name: Step References
classes.notes: Avoid above/below; use explicit step numbers.

classes.name: Abbreviations (Non-units)
classes.notes: Glossary discipline; not min/hr for time.
